evals.prompt: Build the login page from this Figma design: https://figma.com/design/abc123/App?node-id=5-10. Make sure to use our shared components from angular-web-common.
evals.expected_output: Analyzes Figma design, maps common components first (buttons, inputs from angular-web-common), shows mapping preview, generates Angular page code with proper routing.

evals.prompt: 이 Figma URL에서 유저 프로필 화면을 구현해줘: https://figma.com/design/xyz/Profile?node-id=3-7
evals.expected_output: Full pipeline: analyze design → map common components → preview → generate Angular code. Uses existing project patterns for routing and services.

evals.prompt: Figmaから実装して。ダッシュボード画面のURLはこちら: https://figma.com/design/dash/Dashboard?node-id=1-1
evals.expected_output: Same pipeline with Japanese context. Checks angular-web-common for reusable components, shows preview, generates production Angular code.
